name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBulletsExtraHelper.ImpulseSpineAngMult
summary: 100% GE Start to impulseSpineAngMult*100% LT End. NB: leaving this as 1.0 means this functionality is not applied and Start and End have no effect.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
